title: Fix admin panel URL routing and visibility issues

requirements.summary: Fix TanStack Router configuration to handle /admin route with hash-based routing and caffeineAdminToken query parameter
acceptanceCriteria: Navigating to the full URL with /admin path successfully loads the AdminDashboardPage
The 'search does not match any documents' error no longer appears
The route handles the caffeineAdminToken query parameter correctly without breaking routing

file_operations.description: Update the TanStack Router route configuration for /admin to properly handle hash-based routing with caffeineAdminToken query parameter. Modify the validateSearch function to accept and preserve all query parameters without strict validation that may cause routing errors. Ensure the route matches /admin path correctly when accessed via direct URL navigation with hash fragments.

Enhance URL parameter extraction utilities to properly parse and handle caffeineAdminToken from hash-based URLs. Ensure the utility correctly extracts parameters from URLs like #caffeineAdminToken=TOKEN/admin and makes them available to the routing system.

requirements.summary: Make Admin Panel navigation link visible in Header for authenticated admin users
acceptanceCriteria: Admin Panel link is visible in the header for users with admin role
The link is properly styled and integrated into the header layout
Clicking the link navigates to /admin successfully

file_operations.description: Ensure the Admin Panel link is consistently visible and properly rendered in the header navigation area for authenticated admin users. Verify that the conditional rendering logic using isCallerAdmin query is working correctly in both draft and production deployments. Check that the link styling matches the header design and that the navigation path is correct.
Verify that the Admin Panel link is also visible in the mobile menu for authenticated admin users. Ensure consistent behavior between desktop and mobile navigation.

requirements.summary: Verify AdminRoute component correctly handles authentication without interfering with TanStack Router path matching
acceptanceCriteria: AdminRoute properly wraps the admin dashboard route without breaking routing
Authentication and admin role checks work correctly
Non-admin users see the unauthorized message as expected

file_operations.description: Review and optimize the AdminRoute protection component to ensure it performs authentication and authorization checks without interfering with TanStack Router's path matching logic. Ensure loading states are handled properly and that the component doesn't cause routing errors or prevent the route from matching. Verify that the component correctly identifies admin users and shows appropriate unauthorized messages for non-admin users.

requirements.summary: Test complete admin panel access flow end-to-end with authentication, navigation, and dashboard functionality
acceptanceCriteria: Admin authentication works with the provided caffeineAdminToken
Direct URL navigation to /admin loads the dashboard
Header link navigation to /admin loads the dashboard
All three admin tabs (Products, Orders, Users) are accessible and functional

file_operations.description: Verify that the AdminDashboardPage renders correctly when accessed via both direct URL navigation and header link navigation. Ensure all three tabs (Products, Orders, Users) are accessible and functional. Add console logging or error boundaries if needed to diagnose any remaining issues with the admin dashboard loading.

Verify that the useActor hook correctly initializes the backend actor with admin authentication when the caffeineAdminToken is present. Ensure the admin token is properly extracted from URL parameters and used for access control initialization. Confirm that the actor is available before admin queries are executed.
